info.title: Checkmob API
info.description: Checkmob is a field service management platform. This API provides access to clients, addresses, work orders, services, questionnaires, users, segments, custom fields, and location data.

get.description: Obtain a bearer token using username and password credentials.

post.description: Create a new client with optional address information.

get.description: Retrieve a client by their ID.

post.description: List clients with filters, pagination, and sorting.
Activate one or more clients by ID.
Deactivate one or more clients by ID.

bearerAuth.description: Bearer token obtained from the /token endpoint.

columns.description: Sort columns (field: true for DESC, false for ASC)
